description: Address review findings: (1) Replace isTermuxInstalled() with non-launching detection via Linking.canOpenURL, (2) Add <queries> declaration for Android 11+ package visibility, (3) Add com.termux.permission.RUN_COMMAND permission, (4) Add auto-poll after launching the server in TermuxSection.
steps: 1. In lib/termux/termux.ts: Replace isTermuxInstalled() to use Linking.canOpenURL instead of startActivityAsync so it does not launch Termux as a side effect.
2. In app.config.ts: Add com.termux.permission.RUN_COMMAND to android.permissions array.
3. In app.config.ts: Add a config plugin that injects <queries><package android:name='com.termux'/></queries> into AndroidManifest.xml.
4. In components/settings/termux-section.tsx: Add auto-poll retry loop after launching the server (poll health every 2s for ~20s).
acceptance_criteria: isTermuxInstalled() does not launch Termux - uses Linking.canOpenURL or similar non-invasive check
app.config.ts includes a plugin that adds <queries> for com.termux package
TermuxSection auto-polls health after start, with a retry loop (~10 attempts, 2s interval)
findings: ConfigPlugin cannot be placed directly in ExpoConfig.plugins array (typed as string|[string]|[string,any]). Applied plugin via export wrapping pattern instead. Used intent:// scheme URI with Linking.canOpenURL for non-invasive Termux detection.
